display.purpose: Brand voice: headings on landing, sign-in, migrate, legal, and the about narrative. Never for the working ledger.

body.purpose: List items, inputs, prose. Humanist CJK working face.

amount.purpose: Hero balances and entry amounts; tabular numerics, the one place numbers are big.

shadows.name: thumb-lift
shadows.purpose: The moving thumb of a switch reads as physical. The only lift on an interactive control.

shadows.name: segment-thumb
shadows.purpose: Quiet lift under the selected segment of a segmented toggle.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus on buttons, inputs, toggles. Soft ember; pointer clicks stay clean.

motion.name: control-transition
motion.purpose: Shared timing for buttons, chips, switches, segments.

motion.name: ease-out-soft
motion.purpose: The about-article fade-up; a quiet opening beat, reduced-motion-aware.

motion.name: partner-toast
motion.purpose: Partner-activity toast: fade+slide in, hold, fade out across its full lifetime.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The firm commit anchor (記下 / 儲存 / 確認). Dark cocoa-ink fill in a soft, cream-lit room.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: var(--control-md, 44px); padding: 0 20px; background: var(--btn-primary-bg, #3A2419); color: var(--btn-primary-text, #fff); border: none; border-radius: var(--radius-bubble, 14px); font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--focus-ring-color, rgba(224,136,86,0.55)); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: default; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: The calm alternative (取消 / 輔助): white surface with a cocoa hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: var(--control-md, 44px); padding: 0 20px; background: var(--surface, #fff); color: var(--ink, #3A2419); border: 1px solid var(--ink-3, #B89C8B); border-radius: var(--radius-bubble, 14px); font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { opacity: 0.85; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--focus-ring-color, rgba(224,136,86,0.55)); }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive actions (離開帳本 / 刪除). Deeper red than Clay debit so leaving never reads as an expense.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: var(--control-md, 44px); padding: 0 20px; background: var(--btn-destructive-bg, #B85A48); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: var(--radius-bubble, 14px); font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--focus-ring-color, rgba(224,136,86,0.55)); }

components.name: Filter Chip (selected)
components.description: Selected filter pill: cocoa-ink fill, white text, compact 34px.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 34px; padding: 0 14px; border-radius: var(--radius-chip, 10px); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: 150ms ease; } .ds-chip-selected { background: var(--toggle-active-bg, #3A2419); color: var(--on-fill, #fff); border: 1px solid transparent; } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--focus-ring-color, rgba(224,136,86,0.55)); }

components.name: Filter Chip (unselected)
components.description: Unselected filter pill: white surface, cocoa-2 text, hairline border.
components.css: .ds-chip-unselected { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 34px; padding: 0 14px; border-radius: var(--radius-chip, 10px); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; background: var(--surface, #fff); color: var(--ink-2, #7A5848); border: 1px solid var(--hairline, rgba(58,36,25,0.10)); cursor: pointer; transition: 150ms ease; } .ds-chip-unselected:hover { color: var(--ink, #3A2419); }

components.name: Segmented Toggle
components.description: Shared pill-toggle primitive (components/ui/SegmentedToggle.tsx): one ink-filled segment, one transparent, on a surface track. Presentational; selection model stays with the caller.
components.css: .ds-seg { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; padding: 2px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--toggle-inactive-bg, #fff); border: 1px solid var(--hairline, rgba(58,36,25,0.10)); } .ds-seg-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 28px; padding: 0 10px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; background: transparent; color: var(--toggle-inactive-text, #7A5848); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-seg-on { background: var(--toggle-active-bg, #3A2419); color: var(--toggle-active-text, #fff); } .ds-seg-item:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--focus-ring-color, rgba(224,136,86,0.55)); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Warm white field, friendly 14px radius, ember focus ring on the wrapper.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: inline-flex; width: 100%; border-radius: var(--radius-bubble, 14px); } .ds-input-wrap:focus-within { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--focus-ring-color, rgba(224,136,86,0.55)); } .ds-input { width: 100%; height: var(--control-md, 44px); padding: 0 14px; background: var(--input-bg, #fff); color: var(--ink, #3A2419); border: 1px solid var(--hairline, rgba(58,36,25,0.10)); border-radius: var(--radius-bubble, 14px); font-size: 15px; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--ink-3, #B89C8B); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Primary surface: white on cream, 20px radius, hairline instead of shadow. Flat by default.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--surface, #fff); color: var(--ink, #3A2419); border: 1px solid var(--hairline, rgba(58,36,25,0.10)); border-radius: var(--radius-card, 20px); padding: 20px; } .ds-card-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--ink-2, #7A5848); } .ds-card-amount { margin-top: 6px; font-family: -apple-system, 'SF Pro Display', system-ui; font-size: 44px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; font-feature-settings: 'tnum'; }

components.name: Switch
components.description: iOS-style settings toggle: ember on, hairline off, white thumb with the only physical lift in the system.
components.css: .ds-switch { position: relative; width: 48px; height: 28px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; padding: 0; cursor: pointer; background: var(--switch-off-bg, rgba(58,36,25,0.10)); transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-switch[data-state="on"] { background: var(--switch-on-bg, #E08856); } .ds-switch-thumb { position: absolute; top: 2px; left: 2px; width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--surface, #fff); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(58,36,25,0.20); transition: transform 150ms ease; } .ds-switch[data-state="on"] .ds-switch-thumb { transform: translateX(20px); } .ds-switch:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--focus-ring-color, rgba(224,136,86,0.55)); }

components.name: FAB (record)
components.description: The single ember moment in the shell: the round invitation to record. The One Ember Rule lives here.
components.html: <button class="ds-fab" aria-label="記一筆"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-fab { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; background: var(--accent, #E08856); color: var(--on-fill, #fff); box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px rgba(224,136,86,0.18); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 150ms ease; } .ds-fab:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-fab:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px rgba(224,136,86,0.18), 0 0 0 7px var(--focus-ring-color, rgba(224,136,86,0.55)); }

narrative.overview: Futari is a ledger that behaves like a lamp left on for two people. The light is present and warm; it witnesses the day without glaring at it. The register is product, but the task is emotional, so restraint is the discipline, not coldness: flat surfaces, hairline separation, a single ember accent, and an editorial serif voice over a humanist CJK working face. The dark cocoa-ink fill is the firm commit anchor in a soft, cream-lit room. The system exists to escape what a money app reflexively becomes: cold fintech, hype-SaaS costume, surveillance framing, gamified guilt, and the teal-and-white budgeting cliché.
keyCharacteristics: Hearth-toned warm palette: lamplit cream ground, cocoa-ink text, a single ember accent.
Flat by default: hairlines and tonal layers convey depth, not shadows.
Editorial serif (Fraunces) for voice; humanist CJK sans (Noto Sans TC) for the work.
Generous, friendly radii (14-20px) on a tight, calm type scale.
Two equals: no UI ever favors or shames one partner.

rules.name: The One Ember Rule
rules.body: Ember (#E08856) is the only accent, and it stays rare: the FAB, a primary CTA, an on-state. If two embers compete on one screen, one of them is wrong. Its scarcity is what makes it feel warm.

rules.name: The Pure-Black-and-White Ban
rules.body: Never #000 or #fff as a brand surface. Text is Cocoa Ink (#3A2419); grounds are warm cream. Surface White is permitted only for cards and sheets that need to lift off the cream.

rules.name: The Quiet-Money Rule
rules.body: Sage means in, Clay means out. They never escalate to alarm-red or success-green. Money here is reported, not judged.

rules.name: The Serif-Speaks Rule
rules.body: Fraunces is reserved for the brand's voice (headings and narrative). Never set body lists, inputs, or amounts in the serif.

rules.name: The No-Weight-600 Rule
rules.body: Weight 600 was dropped to cut render-blocking CSS; font-semibold falls back to 500. Build hierarchy with size and the 400/500 contrast, not heavier weights.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The only box-shadows are the toggle thumb lift and the focus ring; both functional, never decorative. To separate two surfaces, use a hairline or a tonal step.

dos: Do keep Ember (#E08856) rare: one accent moment per screen.
Do separate surfaces with hairlines and tonal steps, not shadows.
Do set headings and brand voice in Fraunces 500; set the working ledger in Noto Sans TC.
Do use the dark Cocoa Ink fill for the primary commit, so the one firm action is unmistakable.
Do give amounts room to be big with tnum, paired with a quiet label.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion; keep transitions near 150ms and ease-out.
Do pair the Sage/Clay credit-debit distinction with a non-color cue for color-blind legibility.
Do treat both partners as equals; never style solo mode as a deficient state.
donts: Don't use #000 or #fff as a brand surface; text is Cocoa Ink, grounds are warm cream.
Don't ship cold fintech (navy-and-gold, dense data grids, wealth-management gravitas).
Don't ship hype-SaaS costume: purple gradients, decorative glassmorphism, gradient text, or the big-number hero-metric dashboard.
Don't use exclamation marks in UI copy, or the words 管理 / 追蹤 / 監控.
Don't add gamified guilt: streaks, budget-exceeded red alarms, you-overspent verdicts, or anxiety to drive engagement.
Don't use a border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe; use a full hairline, a tonal tint, or a leading icon.
Don't reach for a drop shadow to separate surfaces; the system is flat by default.
Don't default to a modal; exhaust inline and sheet-based progressive alternatives first.
Don't fall into the teal-and-white budgeting-app aesthetic; the warm lamp exists to escape it.
